title: Ability for a user to enter details of whole team in WorkForms
excerpt: We have a lot of events where companies need to register their teams and we’re currently using Humanitix as it allows one person to enter the details for their whole team (number can be selected prior by us in the back e…

posts.author: trinitynell (Trinity Nell)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a lot of events where companies need to register their teams and we’re currently using Humanitix as it allows one person to enter the details for their whole team (number can be selected prior by us in the back end). Is there a way we can do this in WorkForms?

Thanks!
